methodsAttempted.query: QS 191-230 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and targeted official page/PDF extraction were used across QS191-230. Search-time scraping was disabled after noisy PDF hits.

artifacts.summary: QS191-230 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for Twente, Deakin, UMD College Park, Minnesota, Calgary, and Florida. Other universities were not expanded without explicit public tool-level official evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: Available for all employees: Microsoft Copilot - University of Twente
Approved genAI tools for learning - Deakin University
Microsoft Copilot Chat - University of Calgary Information Technologies
Guidelines for EDIS Authors When Using AI Tools - University of Florida

stopConditions: Stop after official source-backed tool-level evidence is captured.
Do not expand broad AI guidance, course policies, training pages, or research PDFs into named tool availability records.

artifacts.title: QS191-230 AI tools crawl report
artifacts.summary: Staged QS191-230 official AI tools records and left universities without explicit tool-level official evidence unexpanded.
limitations: Tool records are tracker-derived metadata and do not replace official university source language.
The pass only expands official public tool-level evidence, not broad AI guidance, training examples, course policies, or generic tool mentions.
